name: board-superpowers
description: Agile scheduling layer for Codex CLI: turn GitHub Projects into the central dispatcher, one session = one PR. Depends on superpowers and gstack.
author: board-superpowers contributors

interface.shortDescription: GitHub-Project-driven scheduling for AI coding sessions
interface.longDescription: board-superpowers turns a GitHub Project into the central dispatcher for AI-driven coding sessions. Routes every session into a Producer routine (briefing-daily / intaking-requirement / reviewing-pr-queue / triaging-board, post-#72) or Consumer mode (one-card-to-PR). Delegates real work — TDD, debugging, review, QA, security — to superpowers and gstack. v1 catalog: 1 entry + 7 molecular + 6 atomic = 14 skills, all shipped. Producer Shape Y refactor shipped in v0.7.0 (#72); sibling-plugin invocation SPOT (`composing-siblings` atomic) shipped in v0.6.0 (#71); setup-stages substrate shipped in v0.5.0 (#67).
